description: SVG elements should be created with correct SVG namespace and render children properly
initialVDOM: dom.el('div', 'root', { class: 'container' }, [dom.el('svg', 'svg1', { viewBox: '0 0 48 48', class: 'track' }, [dom.el('circle', 'bg', { cx: '24', cy: '24', r: '20', fill: 'none', 'stroke-width': '4' }), dom.el('circle', 'ind', { cx: '24', cy: '24', r: '20', fill: 'none', 'stroke-width': '4', 'stroke-linecap': 'round' })]), dom.el('span', 'label', {}, [dom.txt(String(state.progress) + '%', 'pct')])])
